data.title: Altai files materials for a special meeting to authorize $4 million reduction of Common Shares for distribution to shareholders.
data.description: Altai Resources Inc. (TSXV: ATI) announced the filing of a management information circular for a special meeting on September 3, 2025. Shareholders will consider a special resolution regarding a reduction of the stated capital of common shares by up to $4,000,000. The purpose is to distribute this amount to Common Shares holders through one or more special cash distributions. This action falls under Section 34(1)(b) of the Business Corporations Act (Ontario).

data.title: BioLab Holdings, Inc. begins largest clinical trial comparing 4 amnion-based therapies + standard care to standard care in wound management.
data.description: A study has been launched in Phoenix to compare the efficacy of four amnion-based therapies combined with standard care against standard care alone in treating chronic wounds. The study, conducted by BioLab Holdings, Inc., a medical manufacturer in Phoenix, will assess the impact of these therapies on wound management. This research aims to provide insights into the effectiveness of these advanced treatments in improving patient outcomes. This initiative marks a significant development in the field of regenerative wound care, with a focus on enhancing standard practices.

data.title: Ero Copper releases Q2 2025 results, will discuss in conference call on Aug 1, 2025, at 11:30 a.m. Eastern time.
data.description: Ero Copper Corp. has released its operational and financial performance for the second quarter of 2025, ending on June 30. The company, listed as TSX: ERO and NYSE: ERO, based in Vancouver, British Columbia, will conduct a conference call on Friday, August 1, 2025, at 11:30 a.m. Eastern time to delve into the details. For those interested in participating, the dial-in information for the call will be available at the conclusion of the press release.

data.title: Report: Trump imposes 50% tariffs on Brazil. Country's economy can handle it, impacting US coffee drinkers and Brazilian farmers.
data.description: The largest economy in Latin America is expected to withstand the impact of a substantial tariff rate increase. However, approximately 20% of American coffee consumers and Brazilian cattle farmers are anticipated to experience adverse effects as a result.

data.title: Elgin Community College in Illinois leads in mechatronics training as smart manufacturing grows.
data.description: In Elgin, Illinois on July 31, 2025, Elgin Community College (ECC) is leading the way in adapting to the trend of smart factories and automated production across the nation. ECC stands out as the sole community college in Northern Illinois equipped with a smart factory, featuring a cutting-edge mechatronics program. This initiative reflects a growing emphasis on technological advancement in education and industry.

data.title: SharpLink Whale owns over $3.2 million in SBET, but zero Ethereum. Find out the reasoning behind this.
data.description: SharpLink Whale has a staggering $3.2 million in SBET, but possesses no Ethereum. Find out the reasons behind this unconventional situation.

data.title: Andlauer Healthcare Group's Q2 2025 results show revenue of $156.6M, net income of $13.5M, and EBITDA of $38.1M. AHG to be acquired by UPS for $2.2B in all-cash transaction. Transaction approved by shareholders and court. CEO optimistic about growth in specialized transportation network and logistics.
data.description: Andlauer Healthcare Group Inc. reported financial results for Q2 2025, with revenue at $156.6 million, operating income at $18.9 million, net income at $13.5 million, and EBITDA at $38.1 million. AHG entered a transaction with UPS valuing the company at $2.2 billion, with shareholders to receive C$55.00 per share. Shareholders approved the transaction, with the Ontario court also approving it. The company expects completion in the second half of the year. CEO Michael Andlauer noted both organic growth and challenges. Revenue details show Logistics and distribution revenue up 3.6% and Healthcare Logistics segment revenue down 6% compared to the same period last year. Operating expenses were down 1.1%, operating income down 14.9%, and net income down 14.5%. Foreign currency translation adjustment impacted total comprehensive income. Earnings per share were $0.34.

data.title: ERES announces €53M in property disposals, ceases monthly distributions, updates on special distribution timing.
data.description: European Residential Real Estate Investment Trust, also known as ERES, provided an update today regarding its planned disposition and special distribution. The REIT disclosed an estimated €52.8 million in supplementary strategic dispositions. Additionally, ERES declared its intention to discontinue its monthly distributions. These updates come as a follow-up to the press release issued on April 2, 2025. Please note that all mentioned amounts do not include transaction expenses or other alterations.

data.title: Highly competitive KIT inhibitors market with key players like ONO Pharmaceutical and Blueprint Medicines. Expect growth in 7MM by 2034.
data.description: Competition in the market for KIT inhibitors is fierce, with key industry players including ONO Pharmaceutical and Blueprint Medicines leading the way. Meanwhile, Celldex Therapeutics, Cogent Biosciences, and Blueprint Medicines are making significant strides in the sector. The market is marked by intense rivalry, with a focus on innovation and market positioning.

data.title: Dana Inc (NYSE: DAN) to report 2025 Q2 results on August 5, conference call/webcast at 9 am EDT.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, in Maumee, Ohio, Dana Incorporated (NYSE: DAN) announced the upcoming release of its financial results for the 2025 second quarter on August 5, 2025. The press release is scheduled for 7 a.m. EDT, with a conference call and webcast to follow at 9 a.m. EDT. Investors and other interested parties can join the conference call and webcast to learn more about the company's performance during this period.

data.title: Graphic Packaging Holding Company (NYSE: GPK) declares quarterly dividend of $0.11 per share on common stock.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, Graphic Packaging Holding Company (NYSE: GPK), a prominent player in sustainable consumer packaging, disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly dividend of $0.11 per common stock share for shareholders on record at the end of the quarter.
